Bash(# Let''s check the actual NixOS steam module to understand extraCompatPackages find /nix/store -maxdepth 1 -name ''*nixos-*'' -type d)
Bash(# Check the steam module in nixpkgs find /nix -path ''*/nixos/modules/programs/steam*'')
Bash(# Find the Proton version being used grep -r ""3133723538"" /home/leet/.local/share/Steam/config/config.vdf)
Bash(# Find available Proton versions ls /home/leet/.local/share/Steam/compatibilitytools.d/ ls /home/leet/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/)
Bash(# Check compatibilitytools.d more carefully ls -la /home/leet/.local/share/Steam/compatibilitytools.d/ # Also check common for Proton ls /home/leet/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/)

Bash(# Find Proton-GE find /home/leet/.steam /home/leet/.local/share/Steam -maxdepth 5 -name ""proton"" -path ""*GE*"" # Also check the nix store for proton-ge ls -d /nix/store/*proton-ge*/bin/proton || which proton-ge || find /nix/store -maxdepth 2 -name ""proton-ge*"" -type d)

Bash(# Check if the WebView2 bootstrapper managed to install or if it needs network # The bootstrapper downloads files - maybe it couldn''t connect # Let''s try a different approach - use the offline installer instead # First check what happened with Edge/WebView2 find ""/home/leet/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/3133723538/pfx"" -iname ""*edge*"" -o -iname ""*webview*"")

Bash(# Check if Lutris can see Proton-GE as a runner # First, let''s check what wine runners Lutris has ls /home/leet/.local/share/lutris/runners/wine/ # And check if Proton-GE is symlinked there find /home/leet/.local/share/lutris -name ""*proton*"" -o -name ""*GE*"")

Bash(# Symlink Proton-GE into Lutris runners directory so Lutris can use it
PROTON_GE=""/nix/store/wj32xd3npvpl1cr12hrahv0ribrjsmc9-proton-ge-bin-GE-Proton10-29-steamcompattool""
LUTRIS_RUNNERS=""/home/leet/.local/share/lutris/runners/wine""

# Create a directory for the proton-ge runner with the wine binary structure Lutris expects
mkdir -p ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin""

# Create wrapper scripts that use steam-run to execute the Proton wine
cat > ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wine"" << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
exec steam-run /nix/store/wj32xd3npvpl1cr12hrahv0ribrjsmc9-proton-ge-bin-GE-Proton10-29-steamcompattool/files/bin/wine "$@"
SCRIPT

cat > ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wine64"" << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
exec steam-run /nix/store/wj32xd3npvpl1cr12hrahv0ribrjsmc9-proton-ge-bin-GE-Proton10-29-steamcompattool/files/bin/wine64 "$@"
SCRIPT

cat > ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wineserver"" << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
exec steam-run /nix/store/wj32xd3npvpl1cr12hrahv0ribrjsmc9-proton-ge-bin-GE-Proton10-29-steamcompattool/files/bin/wineserver "$@"
SCRIPT

chmod +x ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wine"" ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wine64"" ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wineserver""

# Symlink the libs
ln -sf ""$PROTON_GE/files/lib"" ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/lib"" 2>/dev/null
ln -sf ""$PROTON_GE/files/lib64"" ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/lib64"" 2>/dev/null
ln -sf ""$PROTON_GE/files/share"" ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/share"" 2>/dev/null

echo ""Done""
ls -la ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/"")

Bash(# Fix shebang - NixOS uses /usr/bin/env bash
LUTRIS_RUNNERS=""/home/leet/.local/share/lutris/runners/wine""

cat > ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wine"" << 'SCRIPT'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
exec steam-run /nix/store/wj32xd3npvpl1cr12hrahv0ribrjsmc9-proton-ge-bin-GE-Proton10-29-steamcompattool/files/bin/wine "$@"
SCRIPT

cat > ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wine64"" << 'SCRIPT'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
exec steam-run /nix/store/wj32xd3npvpl1cr12hrahv0ribrjsmc9-proton-ge-bin-GE-Proton10-29-steamcompattool/files/bin/wine64 "$@"
SCRIPT

cat > ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wineserver"" << 'SCRIPT'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
exec steam-run /nix/store/wj32xd3npvpl1cr12hrahv0ribrjsmc9-proton-ge-bin-GE-Proton10-29-steamcompattool/files/bin/wineserver "$@"
SCRIPT

chmod +x ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wine"" ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wine64"" ""$LUTRIS_RUNNERS/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wineserver""

# Test again
/home/leet/.local/share/lutris/runners/wine/proton-ge-10-29/bin/wine64 --version 2>&1)

  export WINEPREFIX=""/home/leet/Games/W3Champions""

  echo ""EXIT: $?"" >> /home/leet/wt.log
')
